heading: Audits and investigations
label: 5161 Audits and investigations

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Subject to the provisions of chapter 75 of title 31, relating to requirements for single audits, the President shall conduct audits and investigations as necessary to assure compliance with this chapter, and in connection therewith may question such persons as may be necessary to carry out such audits and investigations.

children.heading: Access to records
children.label: b Access to records
children.text: For purposes of audits and investigations under this section, the President and Comptroller General may inspect any books, documents, papers, and records of any person relating to any activity undertaken or funded under this chapter.

children.heading: State and local audits
children.label: c State and local audits
children.text: The President may require audits by State and local governments in connection with assistance under this chapter when necessary to assure compliance with this chapter or related regulations.
